service.description: Handle MCP initialize request using Moqui authentication
Handle MCP tools/call — dispatches to agent-oriented MCP tools

actions.script: import groovy.json.JsonBuilder Set userGroupIdSet = (ec.user.userGroupIdSet ?: []) as Set boolean isDebugUser = userGroupIdSet.contains('MCP_DEBUG') || userGroupIdSet.contains('ADMIN') def toolMappings = [ "moqui_get_runtime_context" : "org.moqui.agent.AgentRuntimeServices.get#RuntimeContext", "moqui_check_runtime_configuration": "org.moqui.agent.AgentRuntimeServices.check#RuntimeConfiguration", "moqui_search_agent_prompts": "org.moqui.agent.AgentPromptServices.search#AgentPrompts", "moqui_get_agent_document" : "org.moqui.agent.AgentPromptServices.get#AgentDocument", "moqui_get_session_context" : "org.moqui.agent.AgentRuntimeServices.get#AgentSessionContext", "moqui_update_session_context": "org.moqui.agent.AgentRuntimeServices.update#AgentSessionContext", "moqui_execute_agent_prompt": "org.moqui.agent.AgentExecutionServices.execute#AgentPrompt", "moqui_check_artifact_access": "org.moqui.agent.AgentRuntimeServices.check#ArtifactAccess", "moqui_find_records_guarded": "org.moqui.agent.AgentRuntimeServices.find#RecordsGuarded", "moqui_search_artifacts" : "org.moqui.agent.RagServices.search#Artifacts", "moqui_get_artifact" : "org.moqui.agent.RagServices.get#Artifact", "moqui_search_all" : "org.moqui.agent.AgentPromptServices.search#AllDocuments", "moqui_call_service_guarded": "org.moqui.agent.AgentRuntimeServices.call#ServiceGuarded", "moqui_resolve_and_execute" : "org.moqui.agent.AgentRuntimeServices.resolve#AndExecuteAgentPrompt", "moqui_discover_artifacts" : "org.moqui.agent.AgentDiscoveryServices.discover#AndIndexArtifacts", "moqui_discovery_status" : "org.moqui.agent.AgentDiscoveryServices.get#DiscoveryStatus", "moqui_create_agent_session" : "org.moqui.agent.AgentRuntimeServices.create#AgentSessionContext", "moqui_update_agent_session_external_context": "org.moqui.agent.AgentRuntimeServices.update#AgentSessionExternalContext", "moqui_find_agent_sessions" : "org.moqui.agent.AgentRuntimeServices.find#AgentSessionsForUser", "moqui_close_agent_session" : "org.moqui.agent.AgentRuntimeServices.close#AgentSessionContext" ] Set debugToolNames = ['moqui_search_artifacts', 'moqui_get_artifact', 'moqui_search_all', 'moqui_call_service_guarded', 'moqui_discover_artifacts', 'moqui_discovery_status'] as Set try { def svc = toolMappings[name] if (!svc) throw new Exception("Unknown tool: ${name}. Available: ${toolMappings.keySet().join(', ')}") if (debugToolNames.contains(name) && !isDebugUser) { result = [content: [[type: "text", text: "Tool not available for current user: ${name}"]], isError: true] return } def toolParameters = [:] if (arguments instanceof Map) toolParameters.putAll(arguments) if (sessionId && !toolParameters.sessionId) toolParameters.sessionId = sessionId if (name == 'moqui_call_service_guarded') { if (!toolParameters.toolName) toolParameters.toolName = name if (!toolParameters.containsKey('directToolCall')) toolParameters.directToolCall = true } def res = ec.service.sync().name(svc).parameters(toolParameters).call() if (ec.message.hasError()) { String errText = ec.message.errorsString ec.message.clearErrors() result = [content: [[type: "text", text: "Error: ${errText}"]], isError: true] return } def actual = res?.result ?: res result = (actual instanceof Map && actual.content instanceof List) ? actual : [content: [[type: "text", text: new JsonBuilder(actual).toString()]], isError: false] } catch (Exception e) { result = [content: [[type: "text", text: "Error: ${e.message}"]], isError: true] ec.logger.error("MCP tool error", e) }

service.description: Handle MCP ping request — returns server health and session info
Return the list of available MCP tools

actions.script:
Set userGroupIdSet = (ec.user.userGroupIdSet ?: []) as Set boolean isDebugUser = userGroupIdSet.contains('MCP_DEBUG') || userGroupIdSet.contains('ADMIN')
List runtimeTools = [ [ name: "moqui_get_runtime_context", title: "Get Runtime Context", description: "Get current user, locale, timezone and permission set.", inputSchema: [type: "object", properties: [:]] ], [ name: "moqui_check_runtime_configuration", title: "Check Runtime Configuration", description: "Validate active moqui-mcp runtime configuration, provider wiring, and optional index presence.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ requireEmbedding: [type: "boolean"], requireReranker: [type: "boolean"], checkIndexes: [type: "boolean"], failOnError: [type: "boolean"] ] ] ], [ name: "moqui_search_agent_prompts", title: "Search Agent Prompts", description: "Search screen-first agent documents indexed in OpenSearch. Prefer this over raw artifact discovery.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ queryText: [type: "string", description: "Natural language user intent"], area: [type: "string", description: "Functional area such as Accounting or Order"], subArea: [type: "string"], domainObject: [type: "string"], actionKind: [type: "string"], operationEffect: [type: "string"], currentScreen: [type: "string"], includeNonExecutable: [type: "boolean"], limit: [type: "integer", description: "Max results, default 8"] ], required: ["queryText"] ] ], [ name: "moqui_get_agent_document", title: "Get Agent Document", description: "Get the full agent prompt document selected from retrieval results.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ documentId: [type: "string", description: "Agent document id returned by moqui_search_agent_prompts"] ], required: ["documentId"] ] ], [ name: "moqui_get_session_context", title: "Get Session Context", description: "Get the MCP working context tied to the current Visit/session.", inputSchema: [type: "object", properties: [:]] ], [ name: "moqui_update_session_context", title: "Update Session Context", description: "Persist current area, screen, business objects and recent retrieval/execution state for follow-up prompts.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ currentArea: [type: "string"], currentSubArea: [type: "string"], currentScreen: [type: "string"], currentBusinessObjects: [type: "object"], loadedDocuments: [type: "array", items: [type: "string"]], lastRetrievedDocuments: [type: "array", items: [type: "string"]], lastExecutedArtifact: [type: "object"], lastResult: [type: "object"] ] ] ], [ name: "moqui_execute_agent_prompt", title: "Execute Agent Prompt", description: "Execute the artifact bound to an agent prompt document with Moqui authz active and confirmation gates for risky actions. Do not use this as the first tool for a natural-language user request. Prefer this only after moqui_search_agent_prompts or moqui_get_agent_document when you already know the exact document. For direct execution of a composite root request such as project plus milestones plus tasks, include queryText.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ documentId: [type: "string"], queryText: [type: "string", description: "Original natural-language request. Include this when the chosen document is the root of a multi-entity aggregate request."], parameters: [type: "object"], confirmed: [type: "boolean"], dryRun: [type: "boolean"], useSessionContext: [type: "boolean"] ], required: ["documentId"] ] ], [ name: "moqui_check_artifact_access", title: "Check Artifact Access", description: "Check if the current user can access an artifact with a specific Moqui authz action.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ artifactTypeEnumId: [type: "string"], artifactName: [type: "string"], authzActionEnumId: [type: "string"] ], required: ["artifactTypeEnumId", "artifactName"] ] ], [ name: "moqui_find_records_guarded", title: "Find Records Guarded", description: "Read-only entity query that preserves Moqui entity authorization and applies a safe result cap.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ entityName: [type: "string", description: "Entity name (e.g. 'mantle.account.invoice.Invoice')"], conditions: [type: "object", description: "Exact-match conditions"], orderBy: [type: "array", items: [type: "string"], description: "Order by fields (prefix - for DESC)"], limit: [type: "integer", description: "Max records, capped to 100"], fieldList: [type: "array", items: [type: "string"], description: "Fields to return (omit for all)"] ], required: ["entityName"] ] ], [ name: "moqui_resolve_and_execute", title: "Resolve and Execute", description: "Composite tool: searches agent prompts, picks the best executable document, and runs it — all in one round-trip. This is the preferred first tool for natural-language user intents and should be used for create, update, assign, close, submit, and other state-changing requests unless you already know the exact executable document. Especially use it for composite requests spanning a root entity and children such as project, milestones, and tasks. Falls back to reporting the resolved document when execution would require confirmation.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ queryText: [type: "string", description: "Natural language user intent to resolve"], parameters: [type: "object", description: "Parameters to pass to the resolved service"], area: [type: "string", description: "Functional area (e.g. Accounting, Order)"], subArea: [type: "string"], domainObject: [type: "string"], actionKind: [type: "string"], operationEffect: [type: "string"], confirmed: [type: "boolean", description: "Explicit confirmation for high-risk actions"], dryRun: [type: "boolean", description: "Validate without executing"], limit: [type: "integer", description: "Max candidates to consider (default 5)"] ], required: ["queryText"] ] ], [ name: "moqui_create_agent_session", title: "Create Agent Session", description: "Register an external AI/chat session (LibreChat, OpenCode, ChatGPT, MCP client). Stores only external context/session identifiers — no chat transcript is stored in Moqui.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ clientTypeEnumId: [type: "string", description: "Client type: AgClientLibreChat, AgClientOpenCodeWeb, AgClientOpenCodeDesktop, AgClientHermesAgent, AgClientChatGPT, AgClientMcp, AgClientApi"], clientBaseUrl: [type: "string", description: "Base URL of the external client"], clientSessionId: [type: "string", description: "Session identifier in the external client"], clientContextId: [type: "string", description: "Client-specific context identifier when distinct from the conversation id"], clientConversationId: [type: "string", description: "Conversation identifier in the external client"], clientUrl: [type: "string", description: "Current URL or route in the external client"], providerEnumId: [type: "string", description: "LLM provider: AgProviderOpenAI, AgProviderOpenAICompat, AgProviderExternalClient"], providerSessionId: [type: "string", description: "Provider-managed session identifier when distinct from thread or conversation"], providerConversationId: [type: "string", description: "Conversation ID at the provider (e.g. OpenAI thread_id)"], providerThreadId: [type: "string", description: "Provider thread identifier when available"], providerLastResponseId: [type: "string", description: "Provider last response or message identifier"], modelName: [type: "string", description: "Model name used in this session"], contextStorageModeEnumId: [type: "string", description: "Context storage mode: AgCtxExternalOnly (default), AgCtxHybrid, AgCtxMoquiFull"] ] ] ], [ name: "moqui_update_agent_session_external_context", title: "Update Agent Session External Context", description: "Update external context identifiers for an existing agent session (e.g. after a new conversation starts or provider thread changes).", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ agentSessionContextId: [type: "string", description: "Session ID returned by moqui_create_agent_session"], clientContextId: [type: "string"], clientConversationId: [type: "string"], clientUrl: [type: "string"], providerSessionId: [type: "string"], providerConversationId: [type: "string"], providerThreadId: [type: "string"], providerLastResponseId: [type: "string"], modelName: [type: "string"], statusId: [type: "string", description: "Session status: AgSessOpen, AgSessActive, AgSessClosed, AgSessError"] ] ] ], [ name: "moqui_find_agent_sessions", title: "Find Agent Sessions", description: "List agent sessions registered for the current user.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ statusId: [type: "string", description: "Filter by status: AgSessOpen, AgSessActive, AgSessClosed, AgSessError"], clientTypeEnumId: [type: "string", description: "Filter by client type"], limit: [type: "integer", description: "Max results (default 20, capped at 100)"] ] ] ], [ name: "moqui_close_agent_session", title: "Close Agent Session", description: "Mark an agent session as closed.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ agentSessionContextId: [type: "string", description: "Session ID returned by moqui_create_agent_session"] ] ] ] ]
List debugTools = [ [ name: "moqui_search_artifacts", title: "Search Artifacts", description: "Privileged artifact search across indexed services, entities, screens, XSD schemas and docs in moqui_artifacts_v1. Use for direct artifact discovery when no screen-first document covers the use case.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ queryText: [type: "string", description: "Natural language query (e.g. 'create invoice for customer')"], artifactTypeList: [type: "array", items: [type: "string"], description: "Filter by type: service, entity, screen, xsd, doc"], componentNameList: [type: "array", items: [type: "string"], description: "Filter by component name"], searchMode: [type: "string", description: "Search mode: bm25, knn, hybrid (default: system property)"], limit: [type: "integer", description: "Max results (default 20)"] ], required: ["queryText"] ] ], [ name: "moqui_get_artifact", title: "Get Artifact", description: "Privileged artifact inspection by type and name. Returns full artifact document from moqui_artifacts_v1 including XSD schema definitions, service parameters, and entity fields.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ artifactType: [type: "string", description: "Artifact type: service, entity, screen, xsd, doc"], artifactName: [type: "string", description: "Canonical artifact name from moqui_search_artifacts results"] ], required: ["artifactType", "artifactName"] ] ], [ name: "moqui_search_all", title: "Search All Documents", description: "Unified search across both moqui_agent_prompts_v1 (screen-first and knowledge documents) and moqui_artifacts_v1 (raw artifacts). Use when you need a comprehensive view of what is available for a given query.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ queryText: [type: "string", description: "Natural language query"], limit: [type: "integer", description: "Max results per index (default 5)"], searchMode: [type: "string", description: "Search mode: bm25, knn, hybrid"] ], required: ["queryText"] ] ], [ name: "moqui_call_service_guarded", title: "Call Service Guarded", description: "Privileged direct service execution with Moqui authz checks and confirmation for high-risk operations.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ serviceName: [type: "string", description: "Service name in verb#noun format (e.g. 'mantle.account.InvoiceServices.create#Invoice')"], parameters: [type: "object", description: "Service input parameters"], confirmed: [type: "boolean", description: "Explicit confirmation required for high-risk operations"] ], required: ["serviceName"] ] ], [ name: "moqui_discover_artifacts", title: "Discover and Index Artifacts", description: "Privileged runtime auto-discovery: scans component directories (service, entity, screen, XSD), extracts artifact metadata, and bulk-indexes into moqui_artifacts_v1. Requires ADMIN or MCP_INDEX_ADMIN.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ componentNameList: [type: "array", items: [type: "string"], description: "Component names to scan (omit for all)"], artifactTypeList: [type: "array", items: [type: "string"], description: "Artifact types: service, entity, screen, xsd"], forceReindex: [type: "boolean", description: "Delete and recreate the index before indexing"], generateEmbeddings: [type: "boolean", description: "Generate embeddings via configured provider"], batchSize: [type: "integer", description: "Indexing batch size (default 100)"] ] ] ], [ name: "moqui_discovery_status", title: "Discovery Index Status", description: "Returns document counts by artifact type and index health for moqui_artifacts_v1.", inputSchema: [ type: "object", properties: [ indexName: [type: "string", description: "Index name (default: moqui_artifacts_v1)"] ] ] ] ]
List toolList = [] toolList.addAll(runtimeTools) if (isDebugUser) toolList.addAll(debugTools) result = [tools: toolList]
